arts.ttl: Rangers megaflop in demand as Aaron Ramsey makes Cardiff promise - Ibrox news bulletin
arts.sum: The former Rangers loanee is making waves in La Liga while another former temporary Ibrox man faces a big fight as an interim boss

arts.ttl: Preview: Cardiff City vs. Oxford United - prediction, team news, lineups
arts.sum: Sports Mole previews Monday's Championship clash between Cardiff City and Oxford United, including predictions, team news and possible lineups.

arts.ttl: Cardiff City sack Omer Riza amid "clueless" jibe, appoint familiar face as interim head coach
arts.sum: Cardiff City announce that they have sacked head coach Omer Riza and appointed a familiar face as his replacement on an interim basis.

arts.ttl: Aaron Ramsey: Arsenal favourite takes on mammoth task in first managerial role
arts.sum: The former Arsenal and Juventus midfielder has been appointed by Championship relegation strugglers Cardiff City.

arts.ttl: Aaron Ramsey: Ex-Arsenal star to lead late Cardiff survival bid in shock manager twist
arts.sum: Wales captain handed coaching reins with Championship strugglers for final three matches in surprise move after Omer Riza sacked
